title: phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthocarpus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthocarpus is a variant of the common garden bean, characterized by its yellow seed pods and is believed to be native to Asia and Africa. The medicinal properties of Phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthocarpus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins in the plant. The health benefits associated with consuming Phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthocarpus include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthocarpus can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
